response.global_analysis: The video consists of spoken English dialogue and on-screen dialogue boxes. There is no vocal music. Subtitles are timed to the vocalizations and on-screen text appearances. Original language and English translation are identical as the source is English.

subtitles.original: What's this?
subtitles.english: What's this?

subtitles.original: Hands!
subtitles.english: Hands!

subtitles.original: You did it! You've done it!
subtitles.english: You did it! You've done it!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, look how... how cute I am.
subtitles.english: Oh my god, look how... how cute I am.

subtitles.original: Aww, I've always been cute, but now...
subtitles.english: Aww, I've always been cute, but now...

subtitles.original: now it's even cute... now everyone can see how cute I am.
subtitles.english: now it's even cute... now everyone can see how cute I am.

subtitles.english: Look at that fat tail. Look at that fat tail.

subtitles.english: I can do everything!

subtitles.english: I can't do that.

subtitles.english: Watch this, guys. You've never seen this before.

subtitles.english: Two in a row? Just kidding.

subtitles.english: I have a world to save.

subtitles.english: Look at that! Everyone loves me!

subtitles.english: Gigi Murin! Hahaha!

subtitles.english: Wizard: Oh, I'm so dizzy.

subtitles.english: Wizard: Oh, oh, I'm sorry.

subtitles.original: What... what should I do to save everyone?
subtitles.english: What... what should I do to save everyone?

subtitles.original: Oh, the world is spinning. Owie.
subtitles.english: Oh, the world is spinning. Owie.

subtitles.english: Wizard: Before saving everyone...

subtitles.original: let's see if you can survive basic chores.
subtitles.english: let's see if you can survive basic chores.

subtitles.original: Basic? I can do basic chores.
subtitles.english: Basic? I can do basic chores.

subtitles.original: Wizard: Let's start with...
subtitles.english: Wizard: Let's start with...

subtitles.original: Start with what? Start with what?
subtitles.english: Start with what? Start with what?

subtitles.original: What? What are we starting with?
subtitles.english: What? What are we starting with?

subtitles.english: What? What? A wing?

subtitles.original: Wait! Wait! What did you do? What did you do?
subtitles.english: Wait! Wait! What did you do? What did you do?

subtitles.original: Oh, did you do something? Wait! Ah!
subtitles.english: Oh, did you do something? Wait! Ah!

subtitles.english: Wait! Wait! Wait!

subtitles.original: No! No!
subtitles.english: No! No!

subtitles.original: The birds took him.
subtitles.english: The birds took him.

subtitles.original: I knew I could never trust a bird.
subtitles.english: I knew I could never trust a bird.

subtitles.original: Sewer Grem: Hey you. Come here! Follow me!
subtitles.english: Sewer Grem: Hey you. Come here! Follow me!

subtitles.original: A Grem?
subtitles.english: A Grem?

subtitles.original: Um... but I have to help my... friend.
subtitles.english: Um... but I have to help my... friend.

subtitles.original: Sewer Grem: You're scared and lost... Not knowing what to do, right?
subtitles.english: Sewer Grem: You're scared and lost... Not knowing what to do, right?

subtitles.original: Sewer Grem: I'll show you how to save your friends. Follow me!
subtitles.english: Sewer Grem: I'll show you how to save your friends. Follow me!

subtitles.original: Oh, okay.
subtitles.english: Oh, okay.

subtitles.original: So small.
subtitles.english: So small.

subtitles.original: This is weird.
subtitles.english: This is weird.

subtitles.original: This place is dark and it smells bad.
subtitles.english: This place is dark and it smells bad.

subtitles.original: Sewer Grem: Hey it smells good!!!!
subtitles.english: Sewer Grem: Hey it smells good!!!!

subtitles.original: Do exactly as I say if you want to save your friends!
subtitles.english: Do exactly as I say if you want to save your friends!

subtitles.original: Sewer Grem: Go to the Grem Kingdom and return with the One Ping, a Honkshoe, and a Straw Hat.
subtitles.english: Sewer Grem: Go to the Grem Kingdom and return with the One Ping, a Honkshoe, and a Straw Hat.

subtitles.original: Why do you need them?
subtitles.english: Why do you need them?

subtitles.original: Sewer Grem: YOU DON'T GET TO ASK ME ANY QUESTIONS!!! NOW GO GIGI, GOOOOOOO!!
subtitles.english: Sewer Grem: YOU DON'T GET TO ASK ME ANY QUESTIONS!!! NOW GO GIGI, GOOOOOOO!!

subtitles.original: Okay.
subtitles.english: Okay.

subtitles.original: Whoa!
subtitles.english: Whoa!

subtitles.original: So this is the Grem Kingdom?
subtitles.english: So this is the Grem Kingdom?

subtitles.original: It's so cool. There's so many Grems!
subtitles.english: It's so cool. There's so many Grems!

subtitles.original: Does this mean this entire kingdom is mine if I save it?
subtitles.english: Does this mean this entire kingdom is mine if I save it?

subtitles.original: Whoa, there's so many of you.
subtitles.english: Whoa, there's so many of you.

subtitles.original: What? No, not all at once. No, no, no.
subtitles.english: What? No, not all at once. No, no, no.

subtitles.original: What? Oh, I can't hear you.
subtitles.english: What? Oh, I can't hear you.

subtitles.original: Let's... let's try this Grem. Lucky little Grem, what's on your mind?
subtitles.english: Let's... let's try this Grem. Lucky little Grem, what's on your mind?

subtitles.original: Grem NPC: Things aren't going well with my partner... I need your help to fix our relationship.
subtitles.english: Grem NPC: Things aren't going well with my partner... I need your help to fix our relationship.

subtitles.original: Aww... that is not my problem.
subtitles.english: Aww... that is not my problem.

subtitles.original: Ah, okay. How about this Grem? Do you have anything interesting to say to me?
subtitles.english: Ah, okay. How about this Grem? Do you have anything interesting to say to me?

subtitles.original: Grem NPC: My tummy is getting very large and I don't know why.
subtitles.english: Grem NPC: My tummy is getting very large and I don't know why.

subtitles.original: Please come with me to the doctor.
subtitles.english: Please come with me to the doctor.

subtitles.original: (Whispering) Okay, a little secret... pregnant.
subtitles.english: (Whispering) Okay, a little secret... pregnant.

subtitles.original: Okay, how about this one?
subtitles.english: Okay, how about this one?

subtitles.english: Grem NPC: Make a contract with me, and become a magical girl!

subtitles.original: Oh, that is not my problem either. Oh no, no, no, no.
subtitles.english: Oh, that is not my problem either. Oh no, no, no, no.

subtitles.original: I will not be doing that. I know what happens when you sign a contract.
subtitles.english: I will not be doing that. I know what happens when you sign a contract.

subtitles.original: You should never put your name down on things.
subtitles.english: You should never put your name down on things.

subtitles.original: Well, these Grems were useless.
subtitles.english: Well, these Grems were useless.
